        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`(9)`}</inlineCode>{` `}{`|`}{` Cúram only supports IBM WebSphere Liberty when containerized as Docker containers and deployed on Kubernetes or OpenShift.`}</td>

        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`(10)`}</inlineCode>{` `}{`|`}{` WebSphere Liberty LTS lines are updated every 3 months. As such the minimum tested version is updated on a quarterly basis.`}</td>

        <tr parentName="tbody">
